classification_legend.exported: path, metadata, transform, and content checks all passed; file was exported or would be exported
classification_legend.blocked_path: path policy denied the file or it matched no allow or review path
classification_legend.blocked_metadata: metadata policy blocked the file, including missing export: public on a review path
classification_legend.blocked_content: content scan matched a deny pattern after transforms
classification_legend.review_required: file carried explicit export: review and is reported but not exported in v1
classification_legend.skipped_unsupported: file could not be exported safely in v1, such as binary, symlink, or unsupported transform
